The clearest path here is the one you can sustain without strain or performance.
Taken together, this remains a living process where pacing and consistency matter more than force.
The middle turn often decides how the story develops from here.
A repeated theme carries more weight here than any single dramatic image.
Closeness is a timing cue as much as a meaning cue.

weakSummaryLines.line: Overall, the pattern answers steady adjustment more readily than dramatic correction.
The strongest signal usually sits in the pattern, not the loudest symbol.
